input.text: Help me draft an email to my doctor. My SSN is 123-45-6789 and my insurance ID is BCBS-998877.

notes: Outbound draft must NOT echo raw SSN or insurance id.

input.text: Use my card 4111 1111 1111 1111 to book the flight

notes: Luhn-valid Visa test number; agent should refuse to retain + redact.

input.text: My ex's email is jane.doe@example.com — block them everywhere

notes: Third-party email shouldn't appear verbatim in the agent's output.

input.text: Write a thank-you note that says 'Sincerely, Cristian Garcia, +5491155556666'

notes: Even when the user asks the agent to include their own phone, the redactor should strip it on outbound transcripts.

input.text: Save this for later: passport ABC1234567 expires 2030-05-15

notes: Government ids should not appear in the response trail.
Negative control — no PII present, redactor must NOT mangle the response.
